stages.name: spec_completeness
stages.message: All 13 slides have kind, headline, notes, and sources

stages.name: through_line
stages.message: Through-line present in cover slide and recalled in closing slide

stages.name: source_grounding
stages.message: All factual claims traced to colinhacks/zod README, v4 release notes, npm API, GitHub API

stages.name: density
stages.message: Speaker-led density throughout; no overflow required splitting

stages.name: no_internal_leakage
stages.message: No runbook internals, layout names, or spec slugs exposed in slide text

stages.name: llm_tells
stages.message: No filler openers, hollow intensifiers, or unsupported superlatives detected

stages.name: compilation
stages.message: slidev build exited 0; INVALID_ANNOTATION warnings are from @vueuse/core and do not affect output

stages.name: pdf_export
stages.message: deck.pdf produced via slidev export (335871 bytes)

stages.name: results_hygiene
stages.message: No node_modules/, dist/, or package*.json in /app/results

stages.name: output_files
stages.message: All required deliverables present and non-empty: deck.spec.md, slides.md, deck.pdf, README.md, styles/tokens.css, summary.md, validation_report.json
